text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka! It happened again! I found more<n>crop
circles!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: R-really? Are you sure you're not just—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I swear I wasn't imaginin' things! Cross<n>my heart!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It was by the riverbank and in the tall<n>grass by the
park! There were these<n>swirly-lookin' circles in the
grass!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But I was training in both of those<n>areas
recently...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oho? Does that mean you're callin' the<n>UFOs
here?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, of course not. That's just—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(Wait... I trained in the last place she<n>found
circles in too. Does that... mean...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: N-no way... Am I really... summoning<n>aliens?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Only one way to find out! Let's go train<n>on the
roof! ☆
